use anyhow::{bail, Result};

pub fn parse_header(data: &[u8]) -> Result<Header> {
    if data.len() < 8 {
        bail!("header too short: expected 8 bytes, got {}", data.len());
    }
    let version = data[0];
    if version != 1 && version != 2 {
        bail!("unsupported protocol version: {version}");
    }
    let length = u32::from_be_bytes([data[4], data[5], data[6], data[7]]);
    Ok(Header { version, length })
}

pub fn decode_frame(payload: &[u8]) -> Result<Frame> {
    if payload.is_empty() {
        bail!("empty frame payload");
    }
    let kind = payload[0];
    if kind > 5 {
        bail!("unknown frame kind: {kind}");
    }
    Ok(Frame {
        kind,
        data: &payload[1..],
    })
}

struct Header {
    version: u8,
    length: u32,
}

struct Frame<'a> {
    kind: u8,
    data: &'a [u8],
}
